ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "departmental_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departmental family */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense type */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense area */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "transaction_number" TEXT /* Transaction number */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "po_line_description" TEXT /* Description of the PO line */,
  "supplier_site_postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the supplier site */,
  "supplier_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier type */,
  "contract_number" TEXT /* Contract number (if applicable) */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Project code (if applicable) */,
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expenditure type */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the transaction */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was approved */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number (if applicable) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_departmental_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("departmental_family_id") REFERENCES departmental_families ("departmental_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_supplier_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_type_id") REFERENCES supplier_types ("supplier_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expenditure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_type_id") REFERENCES expenditure_types ("expenditure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departmental_families" (
  "departmental_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departmental family */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the departmental family */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the departmental family */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the departmental family */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the departmental family */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the departmental family was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the departmental family was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("departmental_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "departmental_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departmental family */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the entity */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_departmental_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("departmental_family_id") REFERENCES departmental_families ("departmental_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_areas" (
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense area */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the expense area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier type */,
  "site_postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the supplier site */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_supplier_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_type_id") REFERENCES supplier_types ("supplier_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_types" (
  "supplier_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_types" (
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance manager, auditor, admin) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contract was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the contract was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
